summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rasoi-Sync Indian Kitchen Manager. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), frontend UI works well with minor overlay interaction issues. Mobile responsiveness is excellent with proper bottom navigation.

minor_issues.issue: Translation API returns same text instead of actual translations
minor_issues.impact: Bilingual features may not work as expected

ui_bugs.issue: Sidebar overlay intercepts clicks on WhatsApp export buttons
Bottom navigation not visible on desktop view, only shows on mobile

design_issues.issue: Digital Dadi widget not showing on homepage

passed_tests: Inventory CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Inventory page - add items with bilingual names
Inventory page - search and filter functionality
Shopping page - add items to grocery/mandi tabs
Meal planner - add meal plans with date and ingredients
Community page - post recipes with YouTube links

high_priority: Fix sidebar overlay issue preventing WhatsApp export button clicks
medium_priority: Investigate translation API - ensure actual translations are returned
Check YouTube API quota/search terms for recipe search functionality
Make bottom navigation visible on desktop view or add alternative navigation
low_priority: Add test festival data to show Digital Dadi widget functionality
